title: STOP pretending AI doesn’t Affect You
summary: David Ondrej argues that AI already affects everyday life and that people should stop denying its relevance. The piece emphasizes the pervasive impact of AI systems on individuals and society.
writeup: David Ondrej makes the case that AI already shapes everyday life and that denying its relevance is untenable. The video centers on a single argument: AI systems exert a pervasive impact on both individuals and society. The takeaway is a call to stop dismissing AI as irrelevant and to recognize its present influence rather than treating it as a distant concern.
